goal: 给 E:/Work/Cooki/ClaudeCode/knowledge-base 做一个 Web 知识管理系统，仅本地运行，不考虑认证。要求：浏览所有 markdown 文档，支持目录和标签导航，类似维基百科的双向链接跳转，全文搜索，以及简单的文档编辑能力。代码输出到 E:/Work/Cooki/ClaudeCode/knowledge-base/web/ 目录

tree.description: Build Flask backend with all API endpoints: /api/tree, /api/doc, /api/tags, /api/search, /api/doc (POST save), plus static file serving and markdown indexing

children.description: Flask app skeleton with config, static serving, and index.html route
Markdown indexing: parse frontmatter, extract tags, wiki-links, backlinks, build in-memory Index class
GET /api/tree returns recursive JSON tree; GET /api/tags returns tag list with counts
GET /api/doc?path=X returns rendered HTML, frontmatter tags, backlinks, and raw content with path traversal protection
GET /api/search?q=X returns matching docs with snippets, limited to 50 results
POST /api/doc saves markdown content to disk, validates .md extension, rebuilds index after save

tree.description: Implement all frontend JS logic: directory tree rendering with expand/collapse, document viewing with wikilink parsing, tag cloud navigation, debounced full-text search, backlinks panel, and markdown edit/save mode
Update index.html to include marked.js CDN for client-side markdown rendering, add editor textarea and save/edit buttons, and fix any structural mismatches with the JS app
Start the server, manually verify all features work end-to-end: tree navigation, doc viewing, wikilinks, tags, search, editing, backlinks
